desc: ALL of the outfits I go through in ballet class 😅🩰 @Eleve Dancewear #ballet #ballerina #ballettok #pointeshoes #balletcore  MY OUTFIT CHANGES DURING BALLET BARRE #1 just woke up 😭 inner fleece is coming off windbreaker back on #2 starting to sweat I’m already sweating by plies let’s be real here it’s been a lil chilly in the mornings (40s-50s) so I’ve been layering up more usually I don’t wear many layers actually bc I sweat so much but it’s been cold okay my legs are warm and I’m overheating now booties stay on tho #3 cheeks are out I NEVER wear tights lol it’s just what I feel most comfortable  in and my company allows it 💛 socks are coming off time to put on ballet flats #4 looking more like a dancer usually I’m a barre in socks kinda girl but the socks I wore this day were too slippery proud of myself bc I used to be so ashamed of my thigh muscles now I show em off 😈 #5 okay but I feel so pretty in a skirt + it’s my fav color I’m fully warm at this point and I’m ready to go to center josh’s class is so fun but challenging 😅 boots are going on I’m ALWAYS a center on pointe girl I just love dancing on pointe haha putting my hair up into my signature twist did you just notice now that my hair isn’t done yet? 😂 I just don’t have time before class to  put it up so I usually do barre with my hair down I’ve mastered putting my hair up in 5 mins #6 my titan form (iykyk) those are ALL of my outfits 😅 okay byeee while I turn into oblivion :)
